'''''Star Wars: Book One''''' is a hardcover collection of the first three volumes of the [[Adventures of a Jedi Prince]] young-readers series from authors [[Paul Davids|Paul]] and [[Hollace Davids]]: ''[[The Glove of Darth Vader]]'', ''[[The Lost City of the Jedi]]'', and ''[[Zorba the Hutt's Revenge]]''. It was published by [[Barnes & Noble, Inc.|Barnes & Noble Books]] in [[January]] [[1997]].

''[[Star Wars: Book Two]]'' collects the final three volumes of the ''Jedi Prince'' series: ''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'', ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'', and [[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']].
